title: Clarify objective and success criteria
detail: Restate goal and define a measurable outcome.

title: Inventory current state
detail: Explore code paths and data structures relevant to the goal.

title: Design minimal implementation path
detail: Define interfaces and the smallest vertical implementation that satisfies the goal.

title: Implement and integrate in slices
detail: Apply changes in small slices that preserve existing behaviour.

title: Validate and operationalise
detail: Run targeted validation and document usage and operational behaviour.

title: Break into execution tickets
detail: Translate the plan into independently executable tasks with explicit dependencies.

title: Define rollback and safety boundaries
detail: Specify failure handling and rollback checkpoints before risky steps.

title: Sequence implementation by risk
detail: Do low-risk scaffolding first; high-risk changes last with guardrails in place.

title: Confirm observability requirements
detail: Define what logs, metrics, and events prove correctness in operation.

title: Prepare verification matrix
detail: Map each requirement to a concrete validation method.

title: Document operator workflow
detail: Capture runbook details for setup, resume, and recovery paths.

title: Finalise delivery checklist
detail: Consolidate completion criteria and handoff artefacts.
